title: Fresh Flower Pots: Compats
description: Add-on for Fresh Flower Pots that adds mod compatibility.
body: ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e716824ef7498058ef85ded65bc7c36e7a81b66d_0.webp) This **Add-on** adds mod compatibility to [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) to make your world consistent and pretty! # Compatibility List [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) [Bushier Flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/bushier-flowers) [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) [[Let's Do] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow) [[Let's Do] HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews) [Friends&Foes (Fabric/Quilt)](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) [[Let's Do] Candlelight - Farm&Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-candlelight-farmcharm-compat) [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) [Hellion's Sniffer+](https://modrinth.com/mod/hellions-sniffer+) [End's Phantasm](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-phantasm) [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics)
